security.wrongPassword: Current password is incorrect. Please try again.
security.deleteWarning: Deleting your account will deactivate your data. This action can be reversed within 30 days.

plan.weekdaysOnlyDescription: Receive notifications only Monday through Friday
plan.cancelDescription: Are you sure? You will keep access until {{date}}.

plan.cancelContact: Having a problem? Talk to us first:

downgrade.title: Leave Ultra?
downgrade.body: By leaving Ultra, you will no longer receive jobs automatically. You will need to manually apply to up to 40 companies. Talk to Norte on WhatsApp to set up your new plan — it's quick.
